Build schema data for use with reactable_schema

Source: R/schema_vis.R
nemo_schema_data.Rd

Builds the nested data frame expected by reactable_schema() for one or more tools from a given package. Useful when you need to inspect or manipulate the data before rendering.

Usage

nemo_schema_data(tools, pkg = "nemo")

Arguments

tools

character vector of tool names.

pkg

package name that owns the tool configs. Defaults to "nemo".

Value

A tibble with columns n, tool, tbl, schema_version, description, row_id.

Examples

nemo_schema_data("tool1", pkg = "nemo")
#> # A tibble: 5 × 6
#>       n tool  tbl    schema_version   description                         row_id
#>   <int> <chr> <chr>  <list>           <chr>                                <int>
#> 1     1 TOOL1 table1 <tibble [3 × 2]> Table1 for tool1 (txt: header pres…      1
#> 2     2 TOOL1 table2 <tibble [2 × 2]> Table2 for tool1 (txt: header pres…      2
#> 3     3 TOOL1 table3 <tibble [2 × 2]> Table3 for tool1 (txt-keyvalue: no…      3
#> 4     4 TOOL1 table4 <tibble [2 × 2]> Table4 for tool1 (txt-nohead: no h…      4
#> 5     5 TOOL1 table5 <tibble [1 × 2]> Table5 for tool1 (csv-nohead-long:…      5
